caption: cyRespond to a property possession claim
paragraph1: cyPriority debts are debts which could lead to serious consequences if you do not pay them.
paragraph2: cyExcluding rent or mortgage arrears, priority debts are:
bulletList: cypayments for goods bought on hire purchase or conditional sale
cyunpaid income tax, National Insurance or VAT

guidanceLink.text: cyRead guidance from Citizens Advice on what counts as a priority debt (opens in new tab)

question: cyDo you have any priority debts?

hasPriorityDebts.required: cySelect if you have any priority debts
